title: McInnes wants Tynecastle 'in full glory' for Rangers game
summary: Hearts boss Derek McInnes wants Tynecastle stadium at full capacity for Monday night's match against Rangers. The manager emphasized the importance of the home atmosphere for the encounter in the capital.
content: Hearts boss Derek McInnes says he wants to see Tynecastle in "its full glory" on Monday night when Rangers arrive in the capital.

zh.title: 麦因尼斯希望泰恩城堡在对阵流浪者队的比赛中满座
zh.summary: 哈茨队主帅德里克·麦因尼斯希望泰恩城堡球场在周一晚上对阵流浪者队的比赛中满座。这位主帅强调了主场气氛对这场在苏格兰首都进行的比赛的重要性。

title: Infantino attempts to orchestrate Israel-Palestine handshake
summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino is attempting to organize a handshake between Palestinian and Israeli representatives at the FIFA Congress in Vancouver. The gesture aims to promote diplomatic unity through the sporting event.
content: Fifa president Gianni Infantino tries to convince Palestinian and Israeli representatives to shake hands at the Fifa Congress in Vancouver.

zh.title: 因凡蒂诺试图促成以巴握手
zh.summary: 国际足联主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺正试图在温哥华举行的国际足联代表大会上组织巴勒斯坦和以色列代表之间的握手。这一举动旨在通过体育活动促进外交团结。

title: Saudi Arabian owners' desire for Newcastle 'unchanged'
summary: Newcastle head coach Eddie Howe confirmed the Saudi Arabian PIF owners remain ambitious for the club despite withdrawing funding from LIV Golf. Their commitment to the club's development remains unchanged despite recent financial decisions elsewhere.
content: Head coach Eddie Howe says Newcastle's owners remain "ambitious" for the club despite the Saudi Arabian PIF's decision to pull out of funding LIV Golf.

zh.title: 沙特阿拉伯老板对纽卡斯尔的抱负未改变
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔主帅埃迪·豪确认，尽管沙特阿拉伯业主从LIV高尔夫撤资，但其对俱乐部的雄心壮志未改变。尽管最近在其他地方做出了财务决定，但他们对俱乐部发展的承诺保持不变。

title: Time for Isak & Wirtz to prove they are the future for Liverpool
summary: With Mohamed Salah unavailable, Liverpool is looking to Alexander Isak and Florian Wirtz to prove their worth as the club's future centerpieces. The duo faces heightened expectations in upcoming matches to demonstrate their capability at the highest level.
content: Without Mohamed Salah, Liverpool need others to take responsibility and the focus is set to intensify on Alexander Isak and Florian Wirtz.

zh.title: 伊萨克和维尔茨需要证明他们是利物浦的未来
zh.summary: 由于穆罕默德·萨拉赫无法出战，利物浦寄望亚历山大·伊萨克和弗洛里安·维尔茨证明他们作为俱乐部未来核心的价值。这两名球员在即将到来的比赛中面临更高的期望，需要证明他们在最高水平的能力。

title: What is Scotland's most iconic goal? This time - McTominay v Griffiths
summary: Fans are voting in a poll to determine Scotland's greatest goal, with this round featuring McTominay and Griffiths. The competition continues the tradition of crowning memorable Scottish football moments.
content: Vote to find out what goal will be crowned Scotland's greatest.

zh.title: 苏格兰最具标志性的进球是什么？这次是麦克托米奈对格里菲思
zh.summary: 球迷们正在投票选出苏格兰历史上最伟大的进球，本轮比赛由麦克托米奈和格里菲思参赛。这场竞赛延续了庆祝苏格兰足球经典时刻的传统。

title: Why was Mudryk given ban in secret and what happens now?
summary: Chelsea winger Mykhailo Mudryk is appealing a four-year doping ban handed down in a secretive process. The case raises questions about the transparency and conduct of anti-doping enforcement.
content: Chelsea winger Mykhailo Mudryk is appealing against a four-year doping ban but why has the process been kept secret, and what happens now?

zh.title: 为什么穆德里克被秘密禁赛，现在会发生什么？
zh.summary: 切尔西边锋米卡伊洛·穆德里克正在上诉一项在秘密程序中做出的四年禁赛处罚。这一事件引发了关于反兴奋剂执法的透明度和实施的问题。

title: Hypnosis, Al Pacino and lies - how I tried to motivate my players
summary: Former manager Tony Pulis recounts unconventional motivational tactics he employed over 30 years in management, including hypnosis and Al Pacino references. He reflects candidly on which innovative approaches worked and which ultimately failed.
content: Tony Pulis explains some of the unorthodox ways he tried to motivate players during his 30 years as a manager, including how some of them did not work.

zh.title: 催眠、阿尔·帕西诺和谎言——我激励球员的方式
zh.summary: 前任经理托尼·普利斯回顾了他在30年管理生涯中采取的非常规激励策略，包括催眠和阿尔·帕西诺的参考。他坦诚地反思了哪些创新方法行之有效，哪些最终未能奏效。

title: Leicester City women face relegation play-off - what happened?
summary: Leicester City Women have been confirmed in a WSL relegation play-off against the third-place team from the second tier. The match will determine whether the club maintains top-flight status.
content: Leicester City Women have been confirmed in a relegation play-off with the team that finished third in WSL 2, so what might that mean for the club?

zh.title: 莱斯特城女足面临降级附加赛 - 发生了什么？
zh.summary: 莱斯特城女足被确认参加英超女子足球降级附加赛，对阵第二级别第三名球队。这场比赛将决定该俱乐部能否保留顶级联赛地位。

title: FPL talking point - five players who could make the difference
summary: With four weeks remaining in the season, Fantasy Premier League managers can boost their mini-league standing by targeting five underowned players who could become difference-makers.
content: With only four weeks of the season remaining, targeting players with low ownership can shoot you up your mini-league. Here are five players who could make all the difference.

zh.title: 英超梦幻联赛热议 - 五名可能扭转局面的球员
zh.summary: 赛季还剩四周，英超梦幻联赛经理们可以通过关注五名被低估的球员来提升小联赛排名，这些球员可能成为关键先生。

title: Hardest thing is knowing you're no longer at your best - Rooney
summary: Wayne Rooney reflects on the psychological challenges of professional football, highlighting that knowing you're no longer performing at peak level is the most difficult aspect of aging as a player.
content: Former England and Manchester United striker Wayne Rooney believes the most difficult thing as a footballer is knowing you are no longer the player you were.

zh.title: 最困难的事是知道你不再处于最佳状态 - 鲁尼
zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼反思职业足球的心理挑战，强调知道自己不再处于巅峰表现是职业选手衰老过程中最困难的方面。

title: The mind and methods of Wrexham's composed icon
summary: An inside look at manager Phil Parkinson's approach and mindset has helped Wrexham achieve remarkable success, as the club makes another push toward a Championship playoff final.
content: Those who have worked under Phil Parkinson reveal the secrets behind his astonishing achievements with Wrexham as they chase another play-off finale.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆沉着领袖的思想与方法
zh.summary: 深入了解经理菲尔·帕金森的方法和思路如何帮助雷克瑟姆取得显著成就，俱乐部再次向英冠附加赛决赛冲刺。

title: Vegas group makes bid to relocate MLS' Whitecaps
summary: An investor group led by Grant Gustavson has submitted a formal bid to acquire MLS's Vancouver Whitecaps and relocate the franchise to Las Vegas.
content: Grant Gustavson, the son of billionaire Tamara Gustavson, is leading an investor group that has made a formal offer to acquire the Vancouver Whitecaps and relocate the team to Las Vegas, a spokesperson for the group confirmed to ESPN.

zh.title: 拉斯维加斯财团提交竞价收购MLS温哥华白帽队
zh.summary: 由格兰特·古斯塔夫森领导的投资集团已提交正式竞价，计划收购MLS温哥华白帽队并将其迁至拉斯维加斯。

title: Wrexham to get live playoff updates on final day
summary: Wrexham manager Phil Parkinson will receive live updates of key matches on the final day as the club's bid for a Championship playoff place goes down to the wire on Saturday.
content: Phil Parkinson has arranged live updates of key games on Saturday to be fed to him as Wrexham's bid for a Sky Bet Championship playoff place goes down to the wire.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆在最后一天获得附加赛现场更新
zh.summary: 雷克瑟姆经理菲尔·帕金森将在最后一天获得关键比赛的现场更新，因为该俱乐部争夺英冠附加赛席位的竞争在周六最后时刻决出。

title: FIFA president Infantino confirms re-election bid
summary: FIFA President Gianni Infantino announced Thursday that he intends to seek re-election, a move that would extend his presidency to 15 years.
content: Gianni Infantino's presidency of FIFA is likely set to extend to 15 years after he confirmed his intention on Thursday to stand for re-election.

zh.title: 国际足联主席因凡蒂诺确认参加连任竞选
zh.summary: 国际足联主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺周四宣布，他打算竞选连任，这将使他的任期延长至15年。

title: Palestine, Israel reps at odds at FIFA congress
summary: Palestinian FA President Jibril Rajoub refused to shake hands with Israeli soccer federation VP Basim Sheikh Suliman during a tense moment at Thursday's FIFA Congress.
content: Palestine Football Association President Jibril Rajoub refused to shake hands with Basim Sheikh Suliman, the vice president of Israel's soccer governing body, during a tense moment at the FIFA Congress on Thursday.

zh.title: 巴勒斯坦和以色列代表在国际足联大会上对立
zh.summary: 巴勒斯坦足协主席吉布里尔·拉乔布在周四的国际足联大会上，在紧张的时刻拒绝与以色列足球联合会副主席巴西姆·谢赫·苏莱曼握手。

title: 'Scandal': LAFC coach slams MLS over schedule
summary: LAFC coach Marc Dos Santos criticized MLS for failing to adjust the regular-season schedule to support the club's Concacaf Champions Cup campaign, calling the situation a "scandal."
content: LAFC head coach Marc Dos Santos criticized MLS for not helping the club succeed in the Concacaf Champions Cup by adjusting their regular-season schedule, calling the situation a "scandal."

zh.title: "丑闻"：LAFC教练批评MLS赛程安排
zh.summary: LAFC教练马克·多斯·桑托斯批评MLS未能调整常规赛赛程以支持该俱乐部的中北美洲冠军杯竞选，他称这一情况是"丑闻"。

title: 🐶  Four-legged fans: World Cup kits for pets!
summary: Fans can now purchase matching World Cup kits for their pets, allowing them to show team support alongside their four-legged companions during the summer tournament.
content: If you're lucky enough to have a special four-legged friend in your life then you can both show support for your team this summer with matching kits.

zh.title: 🐶 四条腿的球迷：世界杯宠物套装！
zh.summary: 球迷现在可以为他们的宠物购买配套的世界杯套装，在夏季锦标赛期间与他们四条腿的伙伴一起展示对球队的支持。

title: Villa's Emery hits out at VAR over 'huge mistake'
summary: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery strongly criticized VAR officials for making a "huge mistake" by not issuing a red card to Elliot Anderson.
content: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery has launched a scathing attack on VAR, saying officials made a "huge mistake" in not showing a red card to Elliot Anderson.

zh.title: 阿斯顿维拉的埃梅里因"巨大错误"抨击VAR
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉主教练乌纳伊·埃梅里强烈批评VAR裁判因未对埃利奥特·安德森出示红牌而犯下的"巨大错误"。

title: Messi sends new team message in promotion bid
summary: Lionel Messi sent an introductory message to UE Cornellà's players and coaching staff following his acquisition of the fifth-division club, emphasizing growth and offering his support.
content: Lionel Messi sent a message to the players and coaching staff of UE Cornellà on Thursday to introduce himself following his acquisition of the club, calling for growth and offering his support to the fifth-division side.

zh.title: 梅西在晋级竞争中向新球队发送信息
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西在收购五级联赛球队UE科内利亚后，向球队球员和教练组发送了介绍信息，强调球队发展并表示提供支持。

title: Ochoa to retire from Mexico after sixth World Cup
summary: Mexico goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa, age 41 and set for a record-tying sixth World Cup appearance, announced he will retire from the national team after this summer's tournament.
content: Mexico goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa, a five-time World Cup veteran set for a record-tying sixth appearance at age 41, announced he will retire from the national team after this summer tournament and may end his professional playing career entirely.

zh.title: 奥楚亚将在第六次世界杯后从墨西哥退役
zh.summary: 41岁的墨西哥门将吉列尔莫·奥楚亚即将第六次参加世界杯，与历史纪录持平，他宣布将在今年夏天的比赛后从国家队退役。
